scenarios.setup: App running, specs defined in openspec/
scenarios.expected: Should spawn 8 persona agents in parallel
assertions: Spawns all 8 personas (Henk, Fatima, Sem, Noor, Annemarie, Mark, Priya, Jan-Willem)
Each persona tests from their specific perspective
Identifies issues found by multiple personas
Ranks issues by severity and cross-persona agreement

scenarios.description: Report includes per-persona and cross-persona sections
assertions: Offers to create OpenSpec changes for gaps
